templates.name: Initial Outreach
templates.subject: Partnership Opportunity with Test
templates.body:
Hi [contact_name],

I noticed Test is [pain_point]. We've helped similar companies in [industry] achieve [result].

Would you be open to a quick 15-min call to explore how we can help?

Best regards,
[sender_name]

templates.name: Value Add - Case Study
templates.subject: How [similar_company] increased [metric] by [percentage]%
templates.body:
Hi [contact_name],

Following up on my previous email. I thought you might find this interesting:

[similar_company] (similar to Test) used our service to:
- [result_1]
- [result_2]
- [result_3]

Would love to share how we can achieve similar results for Test.

Best,
[sender_name]

templates.name: Friendly Check-in
templates.subject: Quick question, [contact_name]
templates.body:
Hi [contact_name],

Just checking in - did you get a chance to review my previous email?

I know you're busy, so I'll keep this brief. We help [industry] companies like Test [value_proposition].

Worth a quick chat?

Best,
[sender_name]

templates.name: Social Proof
templates.subject: [industry] companies trust us
templates.body:
Hi [contact_name],

I wanted to share some quick wins from our clients in [industry]:

✓ [client_1]: [result_1]
✓ [client_2]: [result_2]
✓ [client_3]: [result_3]

These companies saw results within [timeframe]. Test could too.

Still interested in learning more?

Best,
[sender_name]

templates.name: Breakup Email
templates.subject: Should I close your file?
templates.body:
Hi [contact_name],

I haven't heard back, so I'm assuming now isn't the right time for Test.

I'll stop reaching out, but feel free to contact me if:
- Your priorities change
- You want to revisit this later
- You have any questions

No hard feelings!

Best regards,
[sender_name]
